hero.title: The World's Healthiest Ergonomic Office Chair
hero.subtitle: Active sitting solutions designed to promote movement, improve posture, and reduce back pain. NEAT Certified by Mayo Clinic.

intro.title: Embracing Active Sitting for Better Health
intro.p1: In response to the extended time we spend sitting each day, which contributes to obesity, illness and back pain, solutions like exercise balls and standing desks were adopted. However, research tells us that it doesn't matter whether we sit or stand, we need to MOVE.
intro.p2: CoreChair aims to target the conditions resulting from sitting disease through its built-in 14-degree multidirectional active sitting movement. It focuses on pelvic stability to offer postural support, with a naturally balanced positioning of your pelvis, spine and head.
intro.p3: As a result, our innovative active sitting design improves joint mobility in the hips, pelvis, and spine, while boosting blood flow, muscle activity and calorie burn.

eliteBanner.title: INTRODUCING THE NEW CORECHAIR ELITE
eliteBanner.description: We took all the best features of the CoreChair Classic, and added a Flexible Upper Thoracic Support. Continue to enjoy the benefits of posture, movement and comfort, now with the addition of a tall back.

advantages.title: Advantages of Active Sitting
advantages.subtitle: CoreChair was developed with a research-based approach to address Sitting Disease and back pain.

backPain.title: Reduced Back Pain
backPain.desc: Pelvic support provides the foundation for a balanced healthy spine to prevent slumping, optimize posture, and reduce back pain and discomfort.

brain.title: Brain Power
brain.desc: Increased blood flow to the brain keeps you alert and creative, making you happier and more productive in the workplace.

core.title: Core Strength
core.desc: Movement is the key to maintaining core strength and more movement will definitely build strength. One absolute is that if you don't use it you will lose it.

pelvic.title: Pelvic Support
pelvic.desc: Our seat cushion works in conjunction with the pelvic support to stabilize the pelvis, optimize sitting posture, and reduce back pain.

calories.title: Increased Caloric Burn
calories.desc: Movement burns calories and helps manage our weight and mood, which provides energy! Using CoreChair can increase metabolic demand by 20%!

circulation.title: Increased Circulation
circulation.desc: Swollen ankles? Movement stimulates your circulation. Not just to make your heart pump but also assists your vascular return.

bloodFlow.title: Blood Flow
bloodFlow.desc: Movement stimulates your lymphatic system and blood flow to keep your vital systems working well.

ergonomic.title: Ergonomic Seat Structure
ergonomic.desc: Sculpted seat harmonizes with pelvic stabilizer to relieve pressure points, prevent sliding, and provide added comfort.

trial.title: Risk-Free Trial
trial.desc: We understand our product is different, and that's a good thing, we promise. Give us an honest try and if you're not satisfied after the trial period, reach out to us. We even offer a complimentary 1-on-1 virtual consultation with our team Kinesiologist.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: CoreChair was established in 2008 with the aim of creating an innovative active sitting office chair. The goal was to foster healthy workplace environments, focusing on the daily needs of the user.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.quote: To offer the world's healthiest, ergonomic, and therapeutic office chair.

journey.title: How Did We Get Here?
journey.p1: Using his expertise in kinesiology and sports medicine, and backed by extensive research, Patrick Harrison, CEO & Founder of CoreChair, has transformed sitting into an active experience.
journey.p2: Recognizing the health detriments of traditional office seating and the inadequacies of exercise balls and standing desks, Harrison created CoreChair to address these issues head-on. The chair is scientifically designed to foster optimal posture and facilitate active sitting, featuring a unique 14-degree range of motion in every direction.
journey.p3: This innovation not only alleviates back pain and mitigates the risks associated with sedentary lifestyles but also promotes joint mobility, boosts circulation, and increases calorie expenditure.

pelvicSupport.title: CoreChair Introduces an Innovative Pelvic Support System
pelvicSupport.desc: CoreChair is crafted to support the back part of your hips, promoting a straighter posture that prevents slumping and helps maintain an upright and balanced spine. Its sculpted seat is designed to cradle your pelvis, enhancing your sitting posture and minimizing back pain.

ambassadors.title: Our Supporters
ambassadors.subtitle: Ambassadors
ambassadors.desc: CoreChair ambassadors are healthcare professionals that see the benefits that CoreChair can offer. These individuals have shown a passion for the active sitting movement and have partnered with us to help spread the word!

science.title: The Science Behind CoreChair
science.subtitle: CoreChair was developed with a research-based approach to address Sitting Disease and back pain.
science.intro: We continue to partner with esteemed institutions to undertake significant research validating the health benefits, safety, and durability of the CoreChair.

cornell.title: CoreChair exerts less pressure points than a standard ergonomic task chair
cornell.desc: Graduate students from Cornell University investigated sitting pressure on CoreChair compared to high end ergonomic office chairs.

callaghan.title: The CoreChair is more efficient at introducing desired movement and an exercise opportunity
callaghan.desc: Dr. Callaghan's research compared the posture of individuals sitting in the CoreChair versus a high end ergonomic office chair, as well as a comparison between CoreChair and a properly fitted exercise ball in the recruitment of core stabilizing muscles.

neat.title: CoreChair is NEAT™ Certified
neat.desc: The Mayo Clinic's NEAT™ (Non Exercise Activity Thermogenesis) certification program looks at solutions that will increase energy expenditure at low intensity, for longer durations.

mayo.title: The incidental movement from a CoreChair had a 20% increase in the calories you burn
mayo.desc: Mayo Clinic, in collaboration with Arizona State University, set out to discover practical solutions to counteract obesity. Dr. James Levine and his team measured caloric burn, comparing outcomes of an ergonomic office chair vs traditional office task chair.

memorial.title: Less back pain, better sitting posture, enhanced blood flow!
memorial.desc: Memorial University found that participants sitting in the CoreChair adopted a more upright posture, lower perceived levels of back stiffness, lower perceived levels of physical tiredness.

cognitive.title: Improved lower extremity blood flow and enhanced cognitive function
cognitive.desc: This four hour duration investigation discovered there was a significant reduction in calf circumference indicative of improved lower extremity blood flow and a significant reduction of errors commissioned utilizing SART (Sustained Attention to Response Task) suggesting enhanced cognitive function with blood flow.
